description: A regional hospital needs to notify an external patient registry API whenever a new admission occurs. Create and deploy a NextGen Connect channel named 'Patient_Notification_API' that transforms HL7v2 (MLLP) messages received via a TCP Listener on port 6661 into JSON. The channel must send an HTTP POST request to http://webhook-server:8888/api/patient-notification with the Content-Type set to 'application/json'. The JSON payload must contain the following fields extracted from the HL7 message: 'mrn' (PID-3.1), 'firstName' (PID-5.2), 'lastName' (PID-5.1), 'dateOfBirth' (PID-7.1 in YYYYMMDD format), and 'eventType' (MSH-9.2). Ensure the channel is deployed and in a STARTED state. A sample HL7 message is available at /home/ga/sample_adt.hl7 for verification. NextGen Connect API: https://localhost:8443/api (admin/admin).
